existing_modules_summary.pit_safety: Partial (WalkForwardValidator has split-by-date pattern; no regime PIT check)

retired_logic_risk: HIGH - multiple TypeScript modules still reference H001-H012 experiment IDs and signal types. These are production TypeScript files; they must not be invoked in T-05 Python skeleton.
strategy_validation_risk: MEDIUM - WalkForwardValidator.ts evaluates signal effectiveness (hitRate, excessReturn). T-05 skeleton must NOT compute these.
production_signal_risk: LOW for Python scripts - high for TS API routes which actively serve data
reusable_components: SQLite direct read pattern from build-market-regime-classifier.py
PIT-safe date window pattern from build-p4-feature-foundation.py
components_requiring_guard: WalkForwardResult table (DO NOT WRITE in T-05)
pit_safety_concerns: Existing WalkForwardValidator splits by date but uses full-period excessReturn calculation
ExperimentRunner may use full-period data for hypothesis evaluation
T-05 must strictly enforce date <= asof_date for all feature queries
decision: CREATE_NEW_PYTHON_SKELETON - no existing portfolio walk-forward; new script needed
